Self.Wiki: Defines parameters related to enemy behavior.

action0DamageId00.Wiki: The damage parameters to use for slot 0.

action0DamageId01.Wiki: The damage parameters to use for slot 1.

action0DamageId02.Wiki: The damage parameters to use for slot 2.

action0GrabDamageId00.Wiki: The grab damage parameters to use for slot 0.

action0GrabDamageId01.Wiki: The grab damage parameters to use for slot 1.

action0GrabDamageId02.Wiki: The grab damage parameters to use for slot 2.

action0AttackWalkMoveAttack.Wiki: The walk attack move this behavior uses.

action0AttackInvincible.Wiki: The uninterruptible type for this behavior.

action0BladeCtrlType.Wiki: The melee control type for this behavior.

action0BulletId00.Wiki: The bullet parameters to use for slot 0.

action0BulletId01.Wiki: The bullet parameters to use for slot 1.

action0BulletId02.Wiki: The bullet parameters to use for slot 2.

action0ShotStanceTime.Wiki: The duration for shooting to be ready for this behavior.

action0AttackRange.Wiki: The attack range for the walk attack.

fAction0AttackBackSwingSpeed.Wiki: The attack start (backswing) speed multipler for this behavior.

fAction0AttackFollowSwingSpeed.Wiki: The attack end (recovery) speed multipler for this behavior.

fAction0AttackEstimateFutureTime.Wiki: The duration for position prediction for this behavior.

fAction0AttackAngle.Wiki: The angle correction (in degrees) for this behavior.

fAction0AttackRotateHigh.Wiki: The turn interpolation start distance (in metres) for this behavior.

fAction0AttackRotateLow.Wiki: The turn interpolation end distance (in metres) for this behavior.

action0ChantSfx.Wiki: The shoot SFX parameters to use for this behavior.

action0ReloadTimeMin.Wiki: The minimum time to wait before repeating this behavior.

action0ReloadTimeMax.Wiki: The maximum time to wait before repeating this behavior.

fAction1AttackEstimateFutureTime.Wiki: The duration for position prediction for this behavior.

fAction1AttackAngle.Wiki: The angle correction (in degrees) for this behavior.

fAction1AttackRotateHigh.Wiki: The turn interpolation start distance (in metres) for this behavior.

fAction1AttackRotateLow.Wiki: The turn interpolation end distance (in metres) for this behavior.

action1ChantSfx.Wiki: The shoot SFX parameters to use for this behavior.

action1ReloadTimeMin.Wiki: The minimum time to wait before repeating this behavior.

action1ReloadTimeMax.Wiki: The maximum time to wait before repeating this behavior.
